threats.title: T-001 - Customer Account Spoofing
threats.description: An attacker could impersonate a legitimate customer to place fraudulent orders or access their order history.

threats.title: Staff Account Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker could impersonate staff to manipulate order statuses,
access sales reports, or modify menu items and application
configurations.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Web Application Server Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker might set up a fraudulent web server to phish user
credentials or intercept sensitive data.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Web Application Server Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker might set up a fraudulent web server to phish user
credentials or intercept sensitive data.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Application Code/Configuration Tampering
threats.description:
Malicious modification of the application’s source code, server
configurations, or environment variables could introduce backdoors or
disable security features.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Staff Account Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker could impersonate staff to manipulate order statuses,
access sales reports, or modify menu items and application
configurations.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Staff Action Repudiation
threats.description:
Staff members (Barista, Manager, Administrator) could deny performing
actions if audit logs are insufficient, not immutable, or can be tampered
with.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Staff Credential Disclosure
threats.description:
Exposure of usernames, passwords, or session tokens for staff members
due to insecure storage or unencrypted transmission.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Application Code and Configuration Disclosure
threats.description:
Exposure of source code, server configurations, environment variables,
or API keys.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Web Application Server DoS
threats.description:
An attacker could flood the Web Application Server with excessive
requests, making it unavailable.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: MongoDB Database DoS
threats.description:
Malicious or poorly optimized queries could overload the database,
making it unresponsive.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Barista/Manager to Administrator Privilege Escalation
threats.description:
A Barista or Manager could exploit a vulnerability to gain Administrator
privileges.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Horizontal Privilege Escalation
threats.description:
Gaining unauthorized access to another user’s account within the same
privilege level.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Order Data Tampering
threats.description:
An attacker could modify order details (e.g., items, quantities, prices,
status) in transit or at rest.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A
